description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Start a standard boiler installation booking for a 3-bedroom home and choose the earliest available appointment that starts between 10:00 and 12:00 after 15 March 2026, then continue with a ‘pay after installation’ payment preference and provide the requested contact details.

tasks.instruction: For a home with 2 bathrooms, find combi boilers priced under $2,000 with a warranty of at least 10 years, sort the results by efficiency from high to low, and add the most efficient one to an installation quote with an undecided installation date.

tasks.instruction: Filter service plans to those that include 24/7 emergency callout with an annual price under $250, choose the cheapest eligible plan, proceed to checkout, and set monthly Direct Debit as the payment method.

tasks.instruction: Use the homepage postcode checker to see if services are available for postcode SW1A 1AA, then submit a callback request for a new boiler installation at that postcode with an afternoon preferred contact time and the requested contact details.

tasks.instruction: Find a current boiler installation offer that includes a free smart thermostat when the installation is completed by the end of 2026, start a booking using this offer with a preferred installation date in December 2026, fill in the requested property and contact details, and proceed to the booking review step.

target_names: Free smart thermostat with any boiler installation

tasks.instruction: In the FAQ section, look up information about cancelling or rescheduling an installation, then open the live chat widget and send a message asking to confirm the cancellation fees for rescheduling a boiler installation.

target_names: How can I cancel or reschedule my installation?

expected_values.chat_message: I would like to confirm the cancellation fees for rescheduling my boiler installation.

tasks.instruction: Use the heating cost calculator for a 120 m² property with 4 occupants and an energy rate of $0.12 per kWh, view the results, then open the recommended boiler from the results, add it to a comparison list, and open the comparison page.

tasks.instruction: Use the installation package builder to create a package by choosing a high-efficiency combi boiler capped at about $2,400 and sorted by lowest price, then add the cheapest smart thermostat under $300 and include a system power flush service, aiming for a total package cost under $3,000 before reviewing the package.
